records.m_SubTitle_ENG: CSE levels rising rapidly from Lv. 3
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: CSE levels rising rapidly from Lv. 3
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: CSE levels rising rapidly from Lv. 3

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it! These C.O.s won't die!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it! These C.O.s won't die!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it! These C.O.s won't die!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who shoved a washed-up TASKFORCE like Fennec Fox in here?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who shoved a washed-up TASKFORCE like Fennec Fox in here?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who shoved a washed-up TASKFORCE like Fennec Fox in here?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're supposed to be evacuating people, not hauling junk! This makes no sense!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're supposed to be evacuating people, not hauling junk! This makes no sense!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're supposed to be evacuating people, not hauling junk! This makes no sense!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're scared, join the evac line right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're scared, join the evac line right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're scared, join the evac line right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want my back covered by someone shaking so hard he can't even shoot straight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want my back covered by someone shaking so hard he can't even shoot straight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want my back covered by someone shaking so hard he can't even shoot straight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You punk... You think I'm fighting alongside the Administration because I want to?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You punk... You think I'm fighting alongside the Administration because I want to?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You punk... You think I'm fighting alongside the Administration because I want to?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Any other day I would put one right between your ey
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Any other day I would put one right between your ey
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Any other day I would put one right between your ey
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it! Watch the front instead of flapping your mouth!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it! Watch the front instead of flapping your mouth!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it! Watch the front instead of flapping your mouth!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-whoa!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-whoa!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-whoa!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How about trying to stay alive instead of screaming like a coward?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How about trying to stay alive instead of screaming like a coward?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How about trying to stay alive instead of screaming like a coward?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There were mines planted?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There were mines planted?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There were mines planted?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the Anti-Corruption War, sloppy behavior usually gets you killed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the Anti-Corruption War, sloppy behavior usually gets you killed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the Anti-Corruption War, sloppy behavior usually gets you killed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Normally I wouldn't care and just mind my own job, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Normally I wouldn't care and just mind my own job, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Normally I wouldn't care and just mind my own job, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This time, the mission benefits from keeping as many people alive as possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This time, the mission benefits from keeping as many people alive as possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This time, the mission benefits from keeping as many people alive as possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Kim Chowon of Alphatrix Innovation, leading the Anti-Corruption War effort.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Kim Chowon of Alphatrix Innovation, leading the Anti-Corruption War effort.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Kim Chowon of Alphatrix Innovation, leading the Anti-Corruption War effort.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kapow!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kapow!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kapow!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Didn't I tell you that it sounds way cooler if you say it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Didn't I tell you that it sounds way cooler if you say it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Didn't I tell you that it sounds way cooler if you say it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chowon! You can't just sprint off the second we arrive!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chowon! You can't just sprint off the second we arrive!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chowon! You can't just sprint off the second we arrive!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And why did you ditch the Alphatrix uniform for that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And why did you ditch the Alphatrix uniform for that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And why did you ditch the Alphatrix uniform for that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This getup fits the desert. It puts me back in the right headspace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This getup fits the desert. It puts me back in the right headspace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This getup fits the desert. It puts me back in the right headspace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The right headspace...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The right headspace...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The right headspace...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. Rage, payback, gunpowder, sunbaked sand... the works.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. Rage, payback, gunpowder, sunbaked sand... the works.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. Rage, payback, gunpowder, sunbaked sand... the works.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're right... We're here to save people. Who cares about a uniform.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're right... We're here to save people. Who cares about a uniform.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're right... We're here to save people. Who cares about a uniform.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That resonates nicely, girl!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That resonates nicely, girl!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That resonates nicely, girl!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cap's choices have never been wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cap's choices have never been wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cap's choices have never been wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We trust Coffin Company, because our righteous Cap does!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We trust Coffin Company, because our righteous Cap does!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We trust Coffin Company, because our righteous Cap does!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Second wave of C.O.s! Incoming!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Second wave of C.O.s! Incoming!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Second wave of C.O.s! Incoming!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are kidding me! That last push wasn't the end of it?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are kidding me! That last push wasn't the end of it?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are kidding me! That last push wasn't the end of it?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, Aswan will fall and this whole defense line will get wiped out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, Aswan will fall and this whole defense line will get wiped out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, Aswan will fall and this whole defense line will get wiped out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We might not be the A-team without Leader, but we know our Anti-Corruption Wars.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We might not be the A-team without Leader, but we know our Anti-Corruption Wars.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We might not be the A-team without Leader, but we know our Anti-Corruption Wars.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We were tasked by the Administration HQ to secure the harbor in this sector.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We were tasked by the Administration HQ to secure the harbor in this sector.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We were tasked by the Administration HQ to secure the harbor in this sector.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From HQ...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: From HQ...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: From HQ...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying we can beat that Beast-type with these numbers?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying we can beat that Beast-type with these numbers?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying we can beat that Beast-type with these numbers?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We will see. We didn't sit around collecting thank-yous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We will see. We didn't sit around collecting thank-yous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We will see. We didn't sit around collecting thank-yous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With upgraded Anti-Corruption spider mines and detonation cords,
records.m_Talk_DEU: With upgraded Anti-Corruption spider mines and detonation cords,
records.m_Talk_FRA: With upgraded Anti-Corruption spider mines and detonation cords,

records.m_Talk_ENG: we can at least buy you a window to pour on the firepower.
records.m_Talk_DEU: we can at least buy you a window to pour on the firepower.
records.m_Talk_FRA: we can at least buy you a window to pour on the firepower.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-all right. Let's do this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-all right. Let's do this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-all right. Let's do this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. For civilian safety, we start with the harbor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. For civilian safety, we start with the harbor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. For civilian safety, we start with the harbor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll anchor the defense line there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll anchor the defense line there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll anchor the defense line there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, Promotion start.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, Promotion start.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, Promotion start.
